Why nothing is shifting

Even when you're doing
everything right.

You were alive in your grandmother's womb. The egg you carry now came from your mother — and it carried everything. Every wish. Every fear. Every unspoken grief passed down through generations.

There is a layer beneath the lifestyle changes most fertility advice never reaches. Your nervous system. Your womb's emotional memory. The part of you still bracing. Still waiting. Still not fully safe to open.

This is not a knowledge gap.
It's a regulation gap.

"I've done everything right… but my body still doesn't feel safe enough to receive."

"Healing has become a checklist. I'm aware of everything, but nothing is moving."

"No one talks about the quiet grief of trying every month and pretending you're okay."

The Conscious Conception Method

Three layers your body must move through
to be ready to receive.

Most fertility support works on one layer. This works on all three — because that's the only way the shift becomes permanent.

01

Regulate

Your body cannot conceive in survival mode. We calm the nervous system so your body feels safe again.

02

Restore

We rebuild what modern life has depleted — hormones, nourishment, cycle health, and womb vitality.

03

Receive

Conception is not forced. It is allowed. We open the emotional and subconscious space required for life to land.

✦ ✦ ✦ ✦

Not more supplements.
Not more pressure.
Not more guessing.
A body that feels safe enough to open.

This is where most women finally understand what has been missing.

About Oshika

I built what I wish
existed when I
needed it most.

After a decade in corporate, I walked away from disconnection and built the work I could not find. A deeper approach to conception — one that includes the nervous system, womb memory, ancestral patterns, and conscious preparation.

Today, I've guided 500+ women across Ireland, India, the US, and beyond — helping them move from pressure and confusion into clarity, safety, and readiness.

Hormonal Health Coach Celtic Breathwork Facilitator Conscious Conception Guide IICT & CPD Accredited

Questions you might still have

Before you decide.

This work complements medical support by addressing the nervous system and deeper emotional layers that are often missed entirely. Many women find that doing this work alongside IVF changes both the experience and the outcome.

Most women who come here have. This is simply a different layer — one that most fertility support never reaches. The nervous system and subconscious body are not addressed in conventional approaches.

Workshop → if you want to understand what's blocking you and experience the work for the first time. Consult → if you want personalised clarity and a 30-day direction. Programme → if you're ready for the full transformation and want Oshika with you throughout.

You don't need certainty. You only need to stop doing this alone. The readiness often comes from inside the container — not before it.

You stay. The work continues — moving from conscious conception into mindful pregnancy with Garbha Sanskar practices, and then into birth preparation as you approach your third trimester. You are supported throughout the entire journey.
